changes: No fresh Tier 1 or Tier 2 release changed the strategic read today; the main movement was continued repo momentum rather than a new category move.
Hermes Agent rose to roughly 103.3k stars in the 2026-04-20 scan, extending yesterday's 100k-crossing momentum without a newer release than v2026.4.16.
PicoClaw published a new nightly build at 2026-04-20 01:03 UTC, while the rest of the watched set mostly showed routine growth and activity.
whyItMatters: This is a consolidation day, not a taxonomy-changing day.
Hermes remains the standout momentum story in the adjacent benchmark lane, but today's movement strengthens the existing read rather than changing it.
PicoClaw's nightly cadence reinforces that the lightweight edge-device branch remains active even without a fresh stable release.
